name: existing-lender-broker-correction-over-statement
anchor: F1.EL broker_correction tier vs mortgage_statement tier
rationale: mortgage_statement doc shows 'Scotiabank'. Broker corrects to clarify the lender is actually 'Scotia Mortgage Corporation' (subsidiary entity holding the actual mortgage; statement was issued by parent). F1.EL canonical-map resolves to broker_correction tier despite mortgage_statement being authoritative within docs tier. Tests cross-tier precedence for lender field.
notes: Two-event sequence. Sibling to A34 — A36 tests broker_correction > mortgage_statement for lender field.
